title: Review Salesforce Partner Order Management App
description:
Review the Salesforce Partner Channel Order App (COA) for managing customer orders, product catalogs, and contract terms as part of the AppExchange partner program.

The COA provides:
- **Home**: Quarterly performance monitoring, tasks, events, and key opportunities
- **Service Orders**: Submit initial, add-on, upgrade, renewal, reduction, and cancellation orders
- **Partner Product Catalog**: Define sellable products, timing, and revenue-sharing details
- **Partner Contract Terms**: View contract terms for sales creation, renewal, and billing
acceptance_criteria: Team reviews the Channel Order App documentation and capabilities
Understanding of order management workflow for AppExchange listings
implementation_notes: This was a review/learning task for the Salesforce Partner Channel Order App to understand order management for the AppExchange listing.
comment_summary: Developer requested a short meeting to discuss the task.
